productName: Collections - T2 - Hash Rosin - Sour Mintz - (DOH) - 1g
description: Double-refined hybrid hash rosin from Sour Mintz — washed, sifted, and cold-pressed with zero solvents, sitting right at the peak of the solventless pyramid. The cleanest expression of the strain — a cool, refreshing mint flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
